top3.sql:
SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM district
        WHERE A2 = 'Prague'
    )
    ORDER BY client_id
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE district_id = (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM district
        WHERE A2 = 'Prague'
    )
    ORDER BY birth_date
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM district
        WHERE A2 = 'Prague'
    )
    ORDER BY client_id
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Prague'
ORDER BY a.date
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM district
        WHERE A2 = 'Prague'
    )
    ORDER BY client_id
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 1;
